title: HealthifyMe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: HealthifyMe is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
HealthifyMe invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Full Stack Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About HealthifyMe:
HealthifyMe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HealthifyMe!
